channel.title: Mr. Alternative
channel.description: Mehnge apps ko chhodiye, aur in muft options ko apnaiye।

item.title: Best Open Source YouTube Alternatives
item.description: NewPipe, SkyTube aur Libretube jaise बेहतरीन ऐप्स की जानकारी।

item.title: Top F-Droid Apps for Privacy
item.description: Apne phone ko safe rakhne ke liye in open-source apps ka use karein।
